sources.name: RusLawOD (academic corpus)
sources.coverage: Federal laws, presidential decrees, government resolutions, through late 2025/early 2026; derived from IPS 'Zakonodatelstvo RF'
sources.access: Bulk download from GitHub releases / HF — RECOMMENDED PRIMARY for legislation
sources.license: Open; verify LICENSE file before redistribution

sources.name: pravo.gov.ru / publication.pravo.gov.ru
sources.coverage: Federal laws, presidential decrees, government resolutions, ministerial acts, regional + municipal legislation
sources.access: Free HTML; NO official bulk API; documents often scanned PDF/TIFF (OCR required)
sources.license: Statutory public domain — Civil Code Art. 1259 exempts laws, judicial decisions, and official documents from copyright; no open-data license declared

sources.name: Supreme Court of Russia
sources.coverage: SC decisions, plenum clarifications, reviews; post-2014 includes former Supreme Arbitrazh Court

sources.name: Constitutional Court of Russia
sources.access: Free web; English /en/ section; no bulk API

sources.name: sudact.ru
sources.access: Free web search; third-party scrapers exist; check robots.txt and rate-limit
sources.license: Aggregated PD decisions; site ToS unclear — uncertain — verify

sources.name: kad.arbitr.ru / ras.arbitr.ru
sources.coverage: All commercial-court cases — trial, appellate, cassation — with events, decisions
sources.access: Undocumented POST endpoints used by frontend; Cloudflare + CAPTCHA; commercial parsers exist; no official public API
sources.license: Public domain (statute); ToS on automated access unclear

sources.name: sudrf.ru / GAS Pravosudie
sources.access: Free web; no API; often rate-limited
